en: But do not open it till Christmas.
You're so pathetic. How long did this take you? Three hours? Five minutes, actually. I am a black belt in gift wrapping. Yeah, no such thing.
ko: 진짜 한심하다. 이거 얼마나 걸렸어? 세 시간? 사실 5분이야. 나는 선물 포장의 달인이거든. 그런 건 없거든.

en: They don't give out black belts for things that are stupid. Well, I hope it was worth it,
ko: 음, 그럴 만한 가치가 있었길 바라.

en: because I'm going to take it apart in about five minutes.
I think it'll take you a little bit longer than that.
ko: 그보다 좀 더 오래 걸릴 걸.

en: Really. If I can skin a mule deer in less than ten minutes,
ko: 정말? 내가 노새사슴 가죽을 10분 안에 벗길 수 있는데,

en: I ought to be able to cut my...
